children.text: I am a student at Kunming Middle School. We have many rules here.
children.keywords: student, Kunming Middle School, many rules

children.text: First, we must arrive at school on time. We can't be late for class.
children.cn: 首先，我们必须准时到达学校。我们不能上课迟到。

children.text: Second, we have to wear the school uniform every day.
children.cn: 第二，我们每天都必须穿校服。

children.text: Third, we can't eat snacks or use phones in the classroom.
children.cn: 第三，我们不能在教室里吃零食或使用手机。
我是昆明中学的学生。我们这里有很多规矩。

children.text: We also have to follow some other rules.
We mustn't run in the hallways or litter.
children.cn: 我们不能在走廊里跑或乱扔垃圾。

children.text: We should be polite and treat everyone with respect.
children.cn: 我们应该礼貌待人，尊重每一个人。
我们还必须遵守其他一些规则。

children.text: I think these rules are good for us.
They help us to become better people.
children.cn: 它们帮助我们成为更好的人。

children.text: No rules, no order! We should follow them.
children.cn: 没有规矩，不成方圆！我们应该遵守它们。
我认为这些规则对我们有好处。
